source_description: Sanitized real legado-style book-source definitions migrated from Documents/Reader-Core/docs/design/书源示例.json (393KB, 3 sources). Retains 2 structurally valuable sources (POST-body templating, @put/@js post-processing, md5 sign flow, JSONPath || fallback, ## regex replacement) with all credentials redacted and all real endpoints neutralized. Exercises the full legado rule DSL surface that the rule-engine-parity branch must support.
sanitization: All api_key/api_secret values → 'REDACTED'. All device_id → '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'. All uid → '00000000'. All md5 sign salts → 'REDACTED_SALT'. g21.manmeng168.com → api.example.test; appi.kuwo.cn → api-b.example.test. Source names → 'Sanitized API Source A/B'. Real device fingerprint in User-Agent → 'Sample Build'. Timestamps removed/zeroed. 3rd source (猫眼看书) dropped as redundant.

privacy_check.notes: All credentials redacted to 'REDACTED' / zero-UUIDs. All real endpoints neutralized to example.test. Rule DSL structure preserved verbatim for parity testing.
